---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - ongoing.
-   High School, İzmir Özel Türk Fen Lisesi, Turkey, 2017-2021

# Work Experience

## Internships

1.  Hugo Boss Tekstil Sanayi Ltd. Şti. , Production Intern, 2024

# Projects

Hacettepe University, Graduation Project

# Competencies

R, Git, Microsoft Excel, Microsoft Powerpoint

# Hobbies

Watching sports events

Reading articles or books about sports

Listening podcasts
